headline: Assessing Nucor (NUE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Earnings Signals
summary: Why Nucor is on investors' radar today Nucor (NUE) is back in focus after a recent pullback, with the share price reflecting a month return of 11.8% and a year-to-date return decline of 4.4%. That move comes against a backdrop of a 1-year total return of 27.1% and a 3-year total return of 14.3%. This is prompting investors to reassess how the current price of US$161.95 lines up with fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Nucor. The recent 30 day share price return of 11.8% decline...

headline: Nucor Sees Stronger Q1 Earnings on Steel Mills Unit Gains
summary: Nucor projects Q1 EPS jumping to $2.70-$2.80 as segment gains drive improved profitability.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $197
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Timna Tanners   maintains Nucor (NYSE:NUE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $194 to $197.
